fields.description:
This is an umbrella JIRA for the beta 1 milestone for YARN Timeline Service v.2.

YARN-2928 was alpha1, YARN-5355 was alpha2.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

fields.summary: [Umbrella] Test and validate HBase-2.0.x with Atsv2

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A task that needs to be done.
issuetype.name: Task

fields.summary: YARN Timeline Service v.2: alpha 2

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

comments.body:
Attaching TSv2 next steps document. Currently we are thinking of targeting the following features for the TSv2 beta release. The timeframe that we are thinking is around Feb 2018.

-  Fault tolerance
- Security / Authorization ACLs
- Migration Path plan for tsv1 to tsv2.
- Supporting multiple hbase versions.

We have branch-yarn-7055 based off of trunk.

Current status: 
Done: 
- Migration Path plan for tsv1 to tsv2.
- Supporting multiple hbase versions.

In Progress:
- Security / Authorization ACLs

TBD (cc [~rohithsharma]) :
- Fault tolerance
- Misc items:
-- hbase shaded jars
-- Yarn Client + ATSv2 Integration YARN-8303
-- Knox + SSO proxy doesn’t work with TimelineReader
-- Serving application logs from ATSv2 YARN-5742 . related  fixed YARN-7753
Does timeline support multiple AHS now?:)
Filed YARN-9802 to track features / enhancements to be done after the next release for ATSv2.  Also marked this jira as unassigned since it's a community effort.

Current status: 
Done:

- Migration Path plan for tsv1 to tsv2.
- Supporting multiple hbase versions.
- Security / Authorization ACLs (at a higher level). [~rohithsharma] will add more details to the epic after consolidating work that has gone into trunk.
- Fault tolerance at the process level. [~prabhujoseph] [~abmodi] and [~rohithsharma] will consolidate the jiras done towards this effort

Coming next:
- Security / Authorization ACLs for entities
- Fault tolerance at the data level

Based on the community discussion call ([~sunil.govind@gmail.com], [~rohithsharma], [~abmodi], [~prabham] [~Sushil-K-S] [~asadineni] and [~vrushalic])  right now, we are looking at timeline service work that will be a part of the next 3.2.1 release. We will do some documentation updates , some jira cleanup and link all appropriate jiras. We are also going to move some feature jiras to the next epic jira YARN-9802 .

Thanks to [~abmodi] [~prabhujoseph] [~prabham] [~vrushalic] [~Sushil-K-S]j [~haibochen] [~varun_saxena] [~sunilg] [~vinodkv] and bunch of folks who helping in reviews - patch/design, guidance, suggestion. Finally, we are announcing ATSv2 as GA.
Kudos! Thanks to all the contributors who helped in ATSv2. (y)

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

comments.body:
Attaching TSv2 next steps document. Currently we are thinking of targeting the following features for the TSv2 beta release. The timeframe that we are thinking is around Feb 2018.

-  Fault tolerance
- Security / Authorization ACLs
- Migration Path plan for tsv1 to tsv2.
- Supporting multiple hbase versions.

We have branch-yarn-7055 based off of trunk.

Current status: 
Done: 
- Migration Path plan for tsv1 to tsv2.
- Supporting multiple hbase versions.

In Progress:
- Security / Authorization ACLs

TBD (cc [~rohithsharma]) :
- Fault tolerance
- Misc items:
-- hbase shaded jars
-- Yarn Client + ATSv2 Integration YARN-8303
-- Knox + SSO proxy doesn’t work with TimelineReader
-- Serving application logs from ATSv2 YARN-5742 . related  fixed YARN-7753
Does timeline support multiple AHS now?:)
Filed YARN-9802 to track features / enhancements to be done after the next release for ATSv2.  Also marked this jira as unassigned since it's a community effort.

Current status: 
Done:

- Migration Path plan for tsv1 to tsv2.
- Supporting multiple hbase versions.
- Security / Authorization ACLs (at a higher level). [~rohithsharma] will add more details to the epic after consolidating work that has gone into trunk.
- Fault tolerance at the process level. [~prabhujoseph] [~abmodi] and [~rohithsharma] will consolidate the jiras done towards this effort

Coming next:
- Security / Authorization ACLs for entities
- Fault tolerance at the data level

Based on the community discussion call ([~sunil.govind@gmail.com], [~rohithsharma], [~abmodi], [~prabham] [~Sushil-K-S] [~asadineni] and [~vrushalic])  right now, we are looking at timeline service work that will be a part of the next 3.2.1 release. We will do some documentation updates , some jira cleanup and link all appropriate jiras. We are also going to move some feature jiras to the next epic jira YARN-9802 .

Thanks to [~abmodi] [~prabhujoseph] [~prabham] [~vrushalic] [~Sushil-K-S]j [~haibochen] [~varun_saxena] [~sunilg] [~vinodkv] and bunch of folks who helping in reviews - patch/design, guidance, suggestion. Finally, we are announcing ATSv2 as GA.
Kudos! Thanks to all the contributors who helped in ATSv2. (y)
